name: Fresh Gingerroot Preserve
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the gingerroots and cut into bite-size pieces.
2. Soak peeled ginger in cold water to cover for 1 hour.
3. Drain the ginger and cover with fresh cold water.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil and cook for 5 minutes.
5. Drain again, cover with fresh cold water, and bring to a boil once more for 5 minutes or until tender.
6. Drain the gingerroot thoroughly and reserve.
7. In a separate pot, combine sugar and 1 cup of water. Cook, uncovered, for 5 minutes or until thick.
8. Add the reserved gingerroot and cream of tartar to the sugar mixture.
9. Bring to a boil and continue boiling for an additional 2 minutes.
10. Pour the preserve into sterilized jars, seal tightly, and store in a cool place. (Water bath for 10-15 minutes is recommended.)
11. Makes three 6-oz. jars.
